name: Depot Service Item Group
query: SELECT g.name AS "Item Group:Link/Item Group:240", g.parent_item_group AS "Parent Group:Link/Item Group:220", g.is_group AS "Is Group:Check:90" FROM `tabItem Group` g WHERE g.name IN ('Depot Services','Standard Depot Handling Charge','Testing Charges','Survey Fee','Exterior Cleaning Fee','Cleaning Cost','Interior Shell - Special Requirement','Repair & Spare Parts','Depot Packages') ORDER BY g.lft
